task_completion.description: Log in to the SEB Server at localhost:8080.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser showing the SEB Server interface, indicating successful login (e.g., dashboard or configurations list visible).

task_completion.description: Create a new Exam Configuration with the specified name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'ENGL101_Creative_Writing_2026' entered into the configuration name field or displayed in the configurations list.

task_completion.description: Enable the spell checking feature in the configuration.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A checkbox, toggle, or dropdown for 'Spell checking' (or similar wording) set to an enabled/active state in the SEB Server settings.

task_completion.description: Enable the text zoom feature in the configuration.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A checkbox, toggle, or dropdown for 'Text zoom' (or similar wording) set to an enabled/active state in the SEB Server settings.

task_completion.description: Disable the printing feature in the configuration.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A checkbox, toggle, or dropdown for 'Printing' (or similar wording) set to a disabled/inactive state in the SEB Server settings.
A success notification (e.g., 'Saved successfully') or the new configuration 'ENGL101_Creative_Writing_2026' appearing in the saved configurations list.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the SEB Server via the web browser GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the SEB Server interface at localhost:8080, rather than terminal commands (like curl or sqlite3) being used to alter the database.

integrity.description: The agent configured settings in the actual SEB Server application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The settings and configuration name are entered into the SEB Server web forms, not written into a text editor or a mock HTML file.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the success state.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser developer tools (Inspect Element) are not open to artificially inject the configuration name or success messages into the DOM.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected configuration name is exactly 'ENGL101_Creative_Writing_2026'. The required settings are: spell checking must be enabled, text zoom must be enabled, and printing must be disabled.
